summary: Step 11 Dual-Row Evidence/Check Model - All 31 backend tests passed (100%). The implementation correctly separates evidence files from employer verification checks. RTW, DBS, Identity, and Address check endpoints work correctly. Agreement endpoints (send, complete, verify, reject) work correctly. Dual-row migration (dry-run and actual) works correctly. Readiness calculation now uses check records as the authoritative source.
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation correctly follows dual-row model: evidence files are separate from employer verification checks
CheckRecordService properly handles supersession of previous checks (is_current flag)
Address verification correctly requires 2 documents (meets_requirement field)
Readiness calculation (calculate_work_readiness_3tier) correctly uses check records as authoritative source
Agreement flow supports multiple completion modes: self_completed, admin_assisted, phone_assisted
seed_data_creation: Test created RTW checks, DBS checks, Identity checks, Address verifications, and Agreement acknowledgements for employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 11 Dual-Row Model fully tested. New collections: rtw_checks, dbs_checks, identity_verifications, address_verifications, agreement_acknowledgements, agreement_requests, agreement_versions. Key endpoints: POST/GET /api/employees/{id}/right-to-work/check, POST/GET /api/employees/{id}/dbs/check, POST/GET /api/employees/{id}/identity/check, POST/GET /api/employees/{id}/address/verify, POST /api/employees/{id}/agreements/send, POST /api/employees/{id}/agreements/complete, GET /api/employees/{id}/agreements, POST /api/employees/{id}/agreements/{id}/verify, POST /api/admin/dual-row-migration/employee/{id}. Readiness calculation uses check records (not just evidence) as authoritative source.

rtw_check_endpoints.details: POST creates check with rtw_chk_ prefix, GET returns current check, history supported, supersession works

dbs_check_endpoints.details: POST creates check with dbs_chk_ prefix, supports update_service_check and manual_certificate_review methods

identity_check_endpoints.details: POST creates check with id_ver_ prefix, supports multiple evidence_document_ids

address_verification_endpoints.details: POST creates verification with addr_ver_ prefix, correctly calculates meets_requirement (2 docs needed)

agreement_send.details: Creates agreement request with agr_req_ prefix, generates secure token, sets due date

agreement_complete.details: Creates acknowledgement with agr_ack_ prefix, supports admin_assisted and phone_assisted modes

agreement_verify_reject.details: Verify sets verification_status=verified, Reject sets verification_status=rejected with reason

dual_row_migration_dry_run.details: Returns preview of what would be migrated without making changes

dual_row_migration_actual.details: Creates check records from verified evidence documents

readiness_uses_check_records.details: calculate_work_readiness_3tier uses CheckRecordService to get RTW, DBS, Identity, Address checks

error_handling.details: All endpoints return 404 for non-existent employees

api_verification.GET /api/employees/{id}/right-to-work/ch: 200 OK - Returns current check and optional history
api_verification.GET /api/employees/{id}/dbs/check: 200 OK - Returns current check and optional history
api_verification.GET /api/employees/{id}/agreements: 200 OK - Returns acknowledgements and pending requests
